title: arundarbor helferi
intro: Arundarbor helferi, also known as Banyan fig or Ficus benghalensis, is a large evergreen tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, recognized by its aerial roots and broad, ovate leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help treat wounds, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Arundarbor helferi include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting digestive health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, and its latex is also used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
